title: cynodon dactylon var. glabratus
intro: Cynodon dactylon var. glabratus, commonly known as smooth buffalo grass, is a variant of the common Bermuda grass (Cynodon dactylon), a type of grass that is widely distributed across the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and fever, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, Cynodon dactylon var. glabratus is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
